auth.welcomeMessage: Sign in to continue to your workspace.
auth.registerDescription: Set up your account to start using the app.
auth.name: Full name
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.

navigation.menuDescription: Browse core areas of the deploy platform.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Manage your deployed projects, environments, and delivery workflow here.

githubWarning.title: Connect GitHub before creating a project
githubWarning.description: This deploy platform needs a connected GitHub account before it can link repositories and create new projects.
githubWarning.helper: Connect GitHub from your account settings to continue.

connected.title: GitHub connected successfully
connected.description: Your GitHub account is now connected. You can continue linking repositories and creating projects.

cancelled.title: GitHub connection was cancelled
cancelled.description: No changes were made to your GitHub connection. You can try again whenever you are ready.

error.title: GitHub connection failed
error.description: We could not complete the GitHub connection. Please try again or check the integration settings.

reasons.access_denied: You denied GitHub access, so the connection was not completed.
reasons.invalid_state: The GitHub authorization request is no longer valid. Please try connecting again.
reasons.user_not_found: We could not find your account in the system. Please sign in again and retry.
reasons.already_connected: Your account is already connected to GitHub.
reasons.account_in_use: This GitHub account is already linked to another user.
reasons.authorization_expired: The GitHub authorization code expired before it could be completed. Please try again.
reasons.oauth_configuration_error: The GitHub integration is currently misconfigured. Please check the integration settings.
reasons.connection_failed: We could not complete the GitHub connection. Please try again in a moment.

states.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading the current page of projects.
states.emptyDescription: Projects will appear here after your first repository is connected.
states.noResultsDescription: Try another keyword or clear the current search.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Inspect build output, runtime logs, and operational events across your platform.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: View a high-level overview of platform health, usage, and recent activity.

newProject.title: Create project
newProject.description: Link a GitHub repository, choose the deploy branch, and configure the build/runtime settings for your next deployment.

card.title: Project setup
card.description: Start with the repository, then review the build and runtime settings before creating the project.

repository.title: Repository
repository.description: Pick the repository that will back this project and confirm the project identity.

build.title: Build configuration
build.description: Optional paths let you adapt this project to monorepos or custom Docker layouts.

runtime.title: Runtime
runtime.description: Set the ports and deployment behavior that should be used when the container runs.

repositories.empty: No repositories are available yet. Connect GitHub or create a repository first.
repositories.emptySearch: No repositories match the current keyword.

githubRepoId.label: GitHub repository
githubRepoId.description: Search by owner, repo name, or default branch.

name.label: Project name
name.description: This name is shown in your project list and deployment views.

deployBranch.label: Deploy branch
deployBranch.description: Choose one of the available branches from the selected repository.

rootDirectory.label: Root directory
rootDirectory.description: Optional. Useful when the app lives in a subfolder of a monorepo.

dockerfilePath.label: Dockerfile path
dockerfilePath.description: Optional. Override the default Dockerfile location.

buildContext.label: Build context
buildContext.description: Optional. Choose a custom build context if Docker should build from another path.

containerPort.label: Container port
containerPort.description: Optional. Leave empty to let the backend use its default port.

hostPort.label: Host port
hostPort.description: Optional. Leave empty to let the platform assign or persist no host port.

autoDeploy.label: Enable auto deploy
autoDeploy.description: Automatically trigger deployments when new commits land on the selected branch.

branches.empty: No branches are available for this repository.
branches.selectRepositoryFirst: Select a repository to load branches first.

errors.UNAUTHORIZED: You need to sign in to continue.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource could not be found.
errors.CONFLICT: This data conflicts with an existing record.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Submitted data is invalid. Please review and try again.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on the server. Please try again later.
errors.DATABASE_ERROR: A database error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_MISSING: Your session is missing refresh credentials. Please sign in again.
errors.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session is invalid. Please sign in again.
errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_REVOKED: Your session has been revoked. Please sign in again.
errors.TOKEN_REVOKED: Your access has been revoked. Please sign in again.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST_ORIGIN: This request origin is not allowed.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_ROLE: Your account does not have the required permissions.
errors.NOT_CONNECTED_GITHUB_YET: You are not connect Github yet
errors.CANNOT_GET_LIST_REPOS_FROM_GITHUB: Unable to fetch repositories from GitHub! Please try again!
